content.content: TV actress who starred in the 2017 film De Serpentis Munere by Roberto Leoni. She has over 150,000 followers on her alexologia Instagram account. She was a conductor on a Romanian program on TVR 2 in 1999. She acted in the film Garcea si oltenii in 2001. She then appeared in Don Gnocchi - The angel of the children in 2004. She was married to Adrian Mutu from 2001 to 2003. She acted alongsidePaolo Conticiniin Try again prof!
